monitor_the_situation.title: — S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 57m ago. Dozens of US fighter jets and tankers escorted an oil tanker through the Persian Gulf and Gulf of Oman, amid ongoing US-Iran tensions.
US Conducts Further Strikes on Iran
— S3 · Conflict · Iran · 2h ago. American forces targeted military surveillance infrastructure at multiple locations in Iran, escalating direct kinetic action between the two countries.
US Airstrikes Target Bandar-e Lengeh, Iran
— S3 · Conflict · Bandar-e Lengeh, Iran · 2h ago. US airstrikes reportedly targeted the coastal Iranian city of Bandar-e Lengeh, escalating tensions following recent exchanges of fire.
